heading: Defined term
label: 9801 Defined term
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title VI of div. BB of , , . Section 600 and subtitle A (§§ 601–609) of title VI enacted this chapter, amended , enacted provisions set out as notes under this section and , amended provisions set out as a note under , Customs Duties, and amended Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1979, set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees. Subtitle B (§ 611) of title VI is not classified to the Code. For complete classification of title VI to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 117–328136 Stat. 5566section 1546 of this titlesection 9802 of this titlesection 2171 of Title 19Dec. 29, 2022

Short Title of 2022 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–328, div. BB, title VI, § 601136 Stat. 5566Dec. 29, 2022“This subtitle [subtitle A (§§ 601–609) of title VI of div. BB of , enacting sections 9802 to 9805 of this title, amending , enacting provisions set out as notes under this section and , amending provisions set out as notes under , Customs Duties, and amended Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1979, set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees] may be cited as the ‘Visit America Act’.”Pub. L. 117–328section 1546 of this titlesection 9802 of this titlesection 2171 of Title 19

Completion of Proceeding, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–328, div. BB, title VI, § 609136 Stat. 5570Dec. 29, 2022“If the Secretary of Commerce, before the date of the enactment of this Act [], has taken any action that, in whole or in part, implements this title [see References in Text note above] or the amendments made by this title, the Secretary is not required to revisit such action to the extent such action is consistent with this title and the amendments made by this title.”Dec. 29, 2022
